focalElement: four-legged dome-body with a single amber vertically-slit eye and a dangling brass key
secondaryElement: radial rays from the eye with volcanic-ash specks trapped in the glass
notes: Emberpeak regular (u-6b) — the only regional regular with a `keys: 1` drop; the dangling key is the visual tell
Fourfold splayed-leg symmetry anchors the radial-halo segmentation
